If you have any questions about the above information or any uncertainty regarding insurance coverage, please do not hesitate to call us. We are here to help you. --- Patient Gallery ---
Before and after orthodontic patient gallery Click any thumbnail to view patient results. --- Meet Dr. Larry White ---
Greenville Orthodontics Larry W. White, DDS, MSD, graduated from Baylor Dental College. Dr.

White then served two years in the United States Air Force Dental Corps before moving to Hobbs where he practiced general dentistry for five years. He returned to Baylor Dental College and received a graduate degree in orthodontics. He practiced orthodontics in Hobbs for 31 years and then began an academic career by starting the University of Texas Health Science Center in San Antonio’s first graduate orthodontic program. Dr.

Orthodontic treatment is a viable option for almost any child and fits in with any lifestyle. The new techniques and appliances Dr. White uses greatly reduces discomfort levels, decreases the frequency of visits, shortens treatment time, and may allow you to choose from several options. Your options include metal braces and clear braces. Imagine the smile your child really wants. If your child has an orthodontic problem, it is likely correctable. Dr.

Homepage

--- Pricing ---
Affordable Braces No down payment. It really is that simple. We accept all major credit cards. No insurance. No problem. Our payment option will fit anyones budget. Affordable Braces Dallas Greenville Orthodontics helps families each year by providing affordable braces. Braces are an important investment and we want to make receiving orthodontic care affordable for you and your family. We are proud of our service and proud to be your Dallas orthodontist.

Schedule your visit today. --- greenville-ortho-ad - Greenville Orthodontics ---
214-812-9987 info@greenville-orthodontics. com Home Meet Dr. Larry White Patient Gallery Services Pricing Contact Book Appointment greenville-ortho-ad Home Contact greenville-ortho-ad greenville-ortho-ad Leave a comment Cancel reply You must be logged in to post a comment.

White has published over 100 professional articles, authored several books about orthodontics and edited numerous professional publications. Dr. White has practiced and taught orthodontics in the Orthodontic Department at Baylor Dental College. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff in Dallas is committed to meeting your needs as a patient with comprehensive care and an affordable treatment plan. --- Services ---
Greenville Orthodontics specializes in treating children and adolescents.

White can help your child achieve the straight, attractive, confident smile they’ve always wanted. At Greenville Orthodontics, Dr. White offers several aesthetically acceptable braces for children in Dallas. We can address: Teeth-crowding Crooked teeth Gaps Overbite, deep bite & buckteeth Space closure Relapse of previous orthodontic treatment So if you have avoided orthodontic care because you think your childs smile is beyond help, talk to the staff at Greenville Orthodontics today.

--- Contact ---
